g.text: The Retry Queue Problem (and the Fix)
PROBLEM: All weeks launch in parallel
Week 1 fails (timeout / bad schema). Retry scheduled.
Retry queue is now backed up behind Weeks 2–12.
User sees Week 2 first. Week 1 may arrive much later.
FIX: Serialize Week 1, then parallelize Weeks 2–12
Weeks 2–12 run in parallel after Week 1 completes
Result: Week 1 guaranteed first. Parallelization benefit preserved for the rest.
